from typing import NamedTuple

def parse_log_line(line: str) -> tuple[str, str, str, int]:
    parts = line.split(" ", 3)
    return parts[0], parts[1], parts[2], int(parts[3])

def get_user_stats(user_id: int) -> tuple[int, float, str, bool, int]:
    total_posts = 42
    avg_score = 3.7
    top_category = "tech"
    is_premium = True
    follower_count = 128
    return total_posts, avg_score, top_category, is_premium, follower_count

def extract_file_metadata(path: str) -> tuple[str, int, str, str]:
    name = path.split("/")[-1]
    size = 1024
    mime = "text/plain"
    encoding = "utf-8"
    return name, size, mime, encoding

def compute_metrics(data: list[float]) -> tuple[float, float, float, float]:
    mean = sum(data) / len(data)
    variance = sum((x - mean) ** 2 for x in data) / len(data)
    minimum = min(data)
    maximum = max(data)
    return mean, variance, minimum, maximum
